blocks.title: Functions with Parameters
Functions with Return
Grade Calculator

questions.question: What are parameters for?
options: To send data into a function
To get data back from a function
questions.explanation: Parameters are the function's inputs. They let you pass different data each time you call the function.

questions.question: What does the return keyword do?
options: Sends data back from the function
questions.explanation: return sends data back to where the function was called AND stops the function execution.
